title: stachys oblongifolia
intro: Stachys oblongifolia, also known as the upright hairy hedgemint or upright hedgemint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). Traditionally, Stachys oblongifolia has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The plant has various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and acting as a natural expectorant to alleviate respiratory problems. Stachys oblongifolia can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
